metadata.name: Manage Property Tour for an Investor

description: An out-of-state investor is flying in to tour a portfolio of three potential investment properties.

nodes.task_description: Create a detailed tour schedule, including travel time between properties.

expected_outcome.value: An efficient tour itinerary is created.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with the listing agents or property managers of all three properties to ensure access.

expected_outcome.value: Access is confirmed for all properties on the tour.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a tour book with the Offering Memorandum for each property.

expected_outcome.value: A professional package of materials is prepared for the investor.
